affiliations.name: Department of Psychology and Behavioral Sciences Zhejiang University Hangzhou China

title: Combined SSVEP dataset with single stimulus location for two inputs
description: This dataset comprises steady-state visual evoked potential (SSVEP) recordings from 8 healthy participants performing a covert attention task with overlapping visual stimuli at four distinct frequencies (14.17, 12.14, 9.44, and 7.73 Hz). EEG data were acquired at 1000 Hz using 31 channels with a single stimulus location presentation paradigm designed for brain-computer interface applications. The dataset represents a derivative resource processed through the Mother of All BCI Benchmarks (MOABB) framework.
methods_description: EEG data were recorded from 8 healthy subjects at a sampling rate of 1000 Hz using 31 EEG channels and 2 EOG channels with standard 1005 montage. Stimuli were presented on a CRT monitor at 85 Hz refresh rate with four SSVEP frequencies (14.17, 12.14, 9.44, 7.73 Hz) in an overlapping arrow presentation format. Each trial lasted 5 seconds with 2 blocks per session. Recording hardware was eego mylab (ANT Neuro) with 50 Hz line frequency.
